scripts.test:health: node -e "(async () => { const { SelfTestSuite } = await import('./src/core/self-test.mjs'); const { loadConfig } = await import('./src/config.mjs'); const { MemoryStore } = await import('./src/memory/store.mjs'); const tester = new SelfTestSuite({ config: await loadConfig(), memory: new MemoryStore(), agent: null, browser: null }); const summary = await tester.runAllTests(); console.log(JSON.stringify(summary, null, 2)); if (!summary.overallOk) process.exit(1); })()"
scripts.e2e: pnpm phase0:e2e && pnpm phase1:e2e && pnpm phase2:e2e && pnpm phase3:e2e && pnpm phase4:e2e && pnpm phase5:e2e && pnpm phase6:e2e && pnpm phase7:e2e && pnpm phase8:e2e && pnpm phase9:e2e && pnpm phase10:e2e && pnpm phase11:e2e && pnpm phase12:e2e && pnpm phase13:e2e && pnpm phase14:e2e && pnpm phase15:e2e && pnpm phase36:e2e && pnpm phase37:e2e
scripts.test:smoke: node scripts/smoke-check.mjs && node scripts/smoke-audit.mjs && node scripts/smoke-verifier.mjs && node scripts/smoke-memory.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:smoke
scripts.deploy:gate: npm run test:all && echo '✅ Deployment gate passed'
